title: 3D Mace Model
description: Adds a custom 3D model for the mace weapon
body:
# Disclaimer
**As of version 1.4, there are two versions of the pack:**
- **3D + 2D Sprite:** This is only compatible with 1.21.4+ as they use the new `minecraft:display_context` properties.
- **3D Model Only:** This is available for every minor version of 1.21, but it does not include the 2D sprite.

# About
Feel the weight of the mace with this resource pack! This pack makes the mace completely 3D, similar to the projectile trident.

# 2D Inventory Sprites:
**v1.2-1.3:** Made possible with the CorePerspectiveModels shader by [ShockMicro](https://github.com/ShockMicro) & [asdru22](https://github.com/asdru22)!

**v1.4+:** Made possible with the [`minecraft:display_context` property](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-snapshot-24w45a#:~:text=MINECRAFT%3ADISPLAY_CONTEXT,fixed), introduced in 1.21.4!
